top_stories.title: Euro Motor celebrates 20th anniversary at Makina Moto Expo 2026
top_stories.summary: PASAY CITY, Philippines — Euro Motor, a pioneer in providing accessible and dependable mobility for Filipinos, marked a historic milestone at the Makina Moto Expo 2026. The event served as the brand’s official debut at the prestigious expo, coinciding with its 20th anniversary of operations in the Philippines.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This could change the rules or incentives around how AI companies build and ship products. It has consequences beyond a single product cycle.

secondary_signals.summary: Property giant Ayala Land Inc. has opened a new public transport hub that will improve mobility within Arca South and strengthen access to key destinations across Metro Manila.

secondary_signals.title: Lexus spin on charging stations
secondary_signals.summary: CHARGING stations have always been a perennial issue for Filipino motorists wishing to own an electric vehicle (EV). Where to charge your EV with ease and comfort has been a nagging question that, on many occasions, has riled EV dreamers, forcing many to quit dreaming.
